decisions.action: Develop and deploy MVP with user authentication and dashboard
decisions.reasoning: Current daily active users are 0, and there are no features shipped, so the priority is to develop and deploy the MVP to start acquiring users and generating revenue.
decisions.expected_impact: Increase daily active users and revenue MRR

messages_to_team.pm: Please prioritize the development and deployment of the MVP with user authentication and dashboard.
messages_to_team.marketing: Prepare for user acquisition campaigns once the MVP is deployed.
messages_to_team.devops: Ensure infrastructure is ready for deployment and monitor costs.

updated_okrs.q3: Ship MVP with user authentication and dashboard, and acquire at least 100 daily active users

goals: Develop and deploy MVP with user authentication and dashboard

features.title: MVP with User Authentication and Dashboard

prd.problem: Current daily active users are 0, and there are no features shipped
prd.solution: Develop and deploy MVP with user authentication and dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Users can register and log in
prd.success_metric: Increase daily active users and revenue MRR
prd.rollback_trigger: Daily active users do not increase after 2 weeks of deployment

messages.designer: Please design the user interface for the MVP with user authentication and dashboard
messages.frontend: Please develop the frontend for the MVP with user authentication and dashboard
messages.backend: Please develop the backend for the MVP with user authentication and dashboard
messages.qa: Please test the MVP with user authentication and dashboard

questions_for_pm: What is the expected user flow for the login and dashboard screens?
Are there any specific design requirements or branding guidelines that need to be followed?
questions_for_frontend: How will the frontend be implemented to ensure accessibility and responsiveness?
What are the plans for handling errors and edge cases in the login and dashboard screens?

tests.name: renders correctly
calls login mutation when submitted
should return 405 for non-POST requests
should return 401 for invalid username or password
should return 200 for valid username and password

bug_reports.title: Login form does not handle edge cases
bug_reports.expected: Error messages should be displayed for empty username and password

release_recommendation.reasoning: The code is well-structured and follows best practices. The tests cover most of the functionality, but some edge cases are not handled.

infrastructure_changes.config: id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL

deployment_plan.rollback_procedure: revert to previous version of login handler

actions: use spot instances for non-production environments

campaigns.name: MVP Launch Campaign
campaigns.hypothesis: The MVP will attract at least 100 daily active users within the first two weeks of deployment.
campaigns.target_audience: Tech-savvy individuals interested in innovative products

assets.title: Introducing Our MVP: A New Era of Innovation
assets.content: Our MVP is now live, offering a unique set of features designed to revolutionize the way you interact with our product.

seo.meta_description: Discover the latest innovation in our industry with the launch of our MVP.

assets.cta: Sign up now to experience the future of innovation.
a_b_variants: Variant B: Emphasis on user experience

landing_pages.headline: Welcome to Our MVP Launch
landing_pages.subheadline: Experience the future of innovation today.
social_proof: Join our community of over 1000 innovators.

faq.a: Our MVP is a minimal viable product designed to test and validate our product's core features.

feedback_to_ceo.market_signal: The market is responding positively to our MVP launch, with a significant increase in daily active users.
feedback_to_ceo.recommended_pivot: None at this time, but we recommend continuing to monitor user feedback and adjusting our strategy as needed.
